message:
Polish: use assert! for Buffer import check and memchr for newline counting

- extensions_js.rs: Replace manual if/panic with assert! macro for the
  Buffer import done-check, improving test output on failure.
- interactive.rs: Replace byte-by-byte .filter().count() with
  memchr::memchr_iter().count() in clamp_to_terminal_height() for
  consistent use of the memchr crate's SIMD-accelerated search.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
